name: Raspberry Nut Cake/1953 Winner
recipeInstructions:
A winner in the seniors division of the 1953 Pillsbury bakeoff.
Sift first five ingredients together. Cream shortening and sugar until creamy and fluffy. Add beaten eggs and mix well. Add dry ingredients alternately with milk and mix until smooth. Stir in nuts and raspberries. Pour into two well greased 8-inch layer pans. Bake at 350 degrees for 30-40 minutes; cool and frost.  Pink Raspberry Frosting: Cream butter or margarine and salt. Blend in 3 cups confectioners sugar alternately with 2 tablespoons pureed raspberries and 2-3 tablespoons hot cream. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla; mix and frost cake. Pat Dwigans
